popularStory.headline: My Maternal 14th. Scottish Grandmother, Margaret Montgomerie, Countess of Lennox
popularStory.description:
Name: Margaret Montgomerie (aka Montgomery), Countess of Lennox
Born: 15 May 1425 in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland
Marriage Contract: 15 May 1438 in Renfrewshire, Scotland to Sir John Stewart, 1st. Ear …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox於大約1425年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑時，她的父親Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie45歲，母親Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie13歲。她和Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1493年7月20日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox于大约1425年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑时，她的父亲Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie45岁，母亲Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie13岁。她和Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1493年7月20日在苏格兰雷福福爾達利享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox was born about 1425, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, was 45 and her mother, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, was 13. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox. She died on 20 July 1493, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox est née environ 1425, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, avait 13 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1493, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox um 1425 in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie 13. Sie hatte mit Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1493 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox è nata il circa 1425 nel Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, aveva 13 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox. Morì il 20 luglio 1493, nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennoxが約1425年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンで生まれた時，父Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerieは45歳，母Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerieは13歳であった。彼女はSir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennoxとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1493年7月20日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox(이)가 대략 1425년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 7월 20일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, tinha 13 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1493, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox родилась около 1425 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie, 13. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox. Она умерла 20 июля 1493 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет.
